subcodes.first_line: O dear handmaiden of God, render thanks unto Him that He hath bestowed upon thee such a son—wise, zealous and accomplished [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز الهی شکر کن خدا را که چنین پسری بتو عطا فرمود عاقل و غیور و کامل
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
